span.p: Component View: Archkit Hybrid Microservices System - Sales Service

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
fallback DB query jika cache
miss

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Single entry point untuk
semua klien eksternal.
Memproxy HTTP request ke
service yang tepat
menggunakan HttpService
(keep-alive). Terhubung ke
Kafka sebagai microservice
listener.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Event streaming platform
untuk komunikasi asinkron
antar service. Topics:
product.created,
product.updated,
product.deleted,
sales.transaction-completed,
inventory.updated.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Database isolasi untuk Sales
Service. Tabel:
sales_transactions,
sales_items, product_cache.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
REST endpoints: POST
/sales/transaction, GET
/sales/transactions/:id.
Mendelegasikan ke
CommandBus/QueryBus.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Hot path: O(1) in-memory
lookup via
ProductCacheService.
Fallback: DB query jika cache
miss (eliminasi 91% failure
rate). Simpan transaksi via
SalesRepository.
Fire-and-forget emit
sales.transaction-completed
ke Kafka.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Ambil SalesTransaction by
UUID beserta relasi items
dari SalesRepository.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Kafka consumer untuk
sinkronisasi cache produk.
Menangani: product.created
(persist ke DB + update
in-memory cache),
product.updated (update DB +
cache), product.deleted
(hapus dari DB + cache).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
In-memory Mapprice}>. Warm-up dari
product_cache table saat
startup. O(1) get/set/delete.
Diperbarui via Kafka events.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Custom repository untuk
transaksi penjualan.
createTransaction(totalPrice,
items): atomik insert
SalesTransaction +
SalesItems. findById(id):
dengan eager loading items.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Kafka producer. Connect on
init.
emitSaleCompleted(payload):
fire-and-forget emit
sales.transaction-completed.
Payload berisi transactionId,
items[], timestamp.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Fields: id (UUID PK),
totalPrice (decimal), status
(ENUM: COMPLETED/FAILED).
Relasi: OneToMany ke
SalesItem.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Fields: id (UUID PK),
transactionId (FK),
productId, quantity (int),
unitPrice (decimal).

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Fields: id (UUID PK), name,
price (decimal). Persistent
cache untuk warm-up setelah
restart service. Diperbarui
via Kafka events.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Registrasi ClientKafka dengan
KAFKA_SERVICE token. Consumer
group: sales-consumer.
Brokers dari env
KAFKA_BROKERS.
